recommendation.title: Crop Suitability Analysis
recommendation.subtitle: AI-driven selection based on soil profile and climate history in {district}
recommendation.description: Based on official TNAU soil maps, historical weather, and drainage metrics for {district}, these crops show the highest success potential. Select ONE crop to lock and customize your farming terminal.

soil_types.ariyalur: Red loamy & Clayey Alluvial (Rich in limestone)
soil_types.chengalpattu: Sandy clay loam & Red soil (Good water absorption)
soil_types.chennai: Sandy loam & Alluvial silt (Coastal basin drainage)
soil_types.coimbatore: Gravelly Loam & Black Soil (Excellent drainage, high potassium content)
soil_types.cuddalore: Coastal Sandy Loam & Laterite Soil (Acidic subsoil, mineral-rich)
soil_types.dharmapuri: Red gravelly clay & Sandy clay loam (Dry rainfed soil)
soil_types.dindigul: Red gravelly clay & Lateritic gravel (Acidic loam profile)
soil_types.erode: Red gravelly loam & Alluvial silt (Excellent canal irrigation compatibility)
soil_types.kallakurichi: Sandy clay loam & Black loam (Highly nutrient retentive)
soil_types.kancheepuram: Clayey loam & Alluvial clay (Ideal for wetlands)
soil_types.kanyakumari: Acidic Laterite & Coastal Alluvial (Heavy rainfall leaching zones)
soil_types.karur: Red gravelly sandy & Sandy loam (Highly aerated drylands)
soil_types.krishnagiri: Red gravelly clay & Clay loam (High mineral reserves)
soil_types.madurai: Red gravelly clay & Alluvial clay (Ideal drainage for floriculture)
soil_types.mayiladuthurai: Clayey Alluvial & River silt (Highly fertile delta soils)
soil_types.nagapattinam: Coastal Alluvial & Saline sand (High saline resistance required)
soil_types.namakkal: Red clay loam & Sandy loam (Rich in iron and potash)
soil_types.nilgiris: Acidic Laterite Forest Soil (High organic matter humic levels)
soil_types.perambalur: Black soil & Red loamy (High calcium carbonate clay)
soil_types.pudukkottai: Red sandy loam & Coastal Alluvial (High drainage permeability)
soil_types.ramanathapuram: Saline Coastal Alluvial & Black clay (Arid zone clay sheets)
soil_types.ranipet: Red sandy clay & Sandy loam (Piedmont gravel loam)
soil_types.salem: Red Sandy Clay Soil (Well-aerated, iron-rich semman soil)
soil_types.sivagangai: Red gravelly clay & Sandy clay loam (Vulnerable to iron deficiency)
soil_types.tenkasi: Red gravelly clay & Sub-mountain loamy (Sub-ghat gravelly sand)
soil_types.thanjavur: Clayey Alluvial Soil & River Silts (Cauvery delta fertile basin)
soil_types.theni: Red clayey loam & Black cotton (Valley clay basins)
soil_types.thiruvallur: Clayey loam & Red soil (Coastal basin sand-silt)
soil_types.thiruvannamalai: Red sandy loam & Clayey loam (Granitic loamy clay)
soil_types.thiruvarur: Clayey Alluvial Soil (Ideal for water retention, high Samba delta yield)
soil_types.thoothukudi: Black cotton soil & Saline coastal (High calcium content)
soil_types.tiruchirappalli: Clayey loam & Sandy alluvial (Cauvery river silt loam)
soil_types.tirunelveli: Alluvial clay & Red sandy loam (Tambraparani basin silt)
soil_types.tirupathur: Red sandy loam & Clay gravelly (Piedmont granitic sands)
soil_types.tiruppur: Black cotton soil & Gravelly red (Excellent dryland black clay)
soil_types.vellore: Sandy loam & Red soil (Granitic block sandy loam)
soil_types.viluppuram: Sandy clay loam & Red loamy (River block silty sand)
soil_types.virudhunagar: Black Cotton Soil & Red Sandy loam (High moisture capacity)

fertilizer.title: Fertilizer Plan
fertilizer.description: Custom nutrient application guide based on the soil conditions of {district} for growing {crop}.
fertilizer.deficiency_reason: {soilType} soil in {district} is typically deficient in key nutrients for {crop}. Below is your adjusted NPK target.
fertilizer.calculator_desc: Enter your farm size in acres to compute the exact fertilizer quantities needed.
fertilizer.calculate_result: For your {acres} acres of {crop}, apply: Urea: {urea}kg, Superphosphate: {ssp}kg, Muriate of Potash: {mop}kg. {micronutrients}
fertilizer.schedule_day_1: Basal Dressing (Sowing): Apply full Phosphorus and 1/3 Nitrogen.
fertilizer.schedule_day_30: First Top Dressing (Tillering): Apply 1/3 Nitrogen booster.
fertilizer.schedule_day_60: Second Top Dressing (Panicle/Flower Initiation): Apply remaining Nitrogen and Potash.

market.title: Market Price Explorer
market.description: Real-time pricing analysis for {crop} in {district} across distinct distribution channels.
market.gov_msp_desc: Guaranteed price floor set by Central/State Agricultural Dept (includes Tamil Nadu state incentives).
market.corporate_contract_desc: Direct agreement with processing food brands / export houses (Fixed premium).
market.calculator_desc: Compute projected earnings based on crop yield estimates.
market.calculator_result: Estimated Revenue: Govt MSP: ₹{govTotal} | Private Mandi: ₹{pvtTotal} | Corporate Contract: ₹{corpTotal}.

weather.title: Smart Weather Forecast
weather.description: Agrometeorological alerts and 7-day outlook for {district} personalized to {crop} growth.

value_added.title: Value-Added Products Explorer
value_added.description: Transform raw harvests of {crop} into processed products for higher margins.
value_added.recommendation: Farmers in {district} processing raw {crop} into value-added products see up to 3x higher revenue: {products}

products.rice: Rice Flour, Poha (Flaked Rice), Rice Bran Oil
products.coconut: Virgin Coconut Oil, Desiccated Powder, Coir Pith Block
products.jasmine: Jasmine Concrete, Essential oil extract, Dried Jasmine buds
products.cashew: Flavored Cashew Kernels, Cashew Apple Syrup, CNSL Shell Oil
products.sugarcane: Jaggery (Vellam), Brown Sugar, Bagasse paper, Ethanol
products.groundnut: Cold-pressed Groundnut Oil, Roasted/Salted Peanuts, Peanut Butter
products.maize: Maize Starch, Corn Flakes, Poultry Feed, Corn Oil
products.tea: Green Tea, Premium Black CTC Tea, Oolong Tea, Matcha
products.potato: Potato Chips, Potato Starch, Dehydrated Potato Flakes

storage.title: Storage & Warehouses
storage.description: Temperature and humidity monitoring guide for storing {crop} safely in {district}.
storage.thresholds: Optimal Storage Thresholds for {crop}: Temperature: {temp}°C, Humidity: {humidity}% RH.

schemes.title: Govt Schemes & Benefits
schemes.description: Active state and central schemes curated for {crop} cultivators in {district}.
schemes.scheme_desc_1: Provides 50% subsidy on high-yield seeds and micro-irrigation kits.
schemes.scheme_desc_2: Crop insurance support covering yield losses due to drought or flooding.
schemes.scheme_desc_3: Interest subvention credit scheme offering farm loans at a reduced interest rate of 4%.

officer.description: Direct communication channel with agricultural authorities in {district}.
officer.officer_assigned: Your assigned Agricultural Extension Officer is: {name}
officer.grievance_title: Submit Farm Grievance or Subsidy Claim
officer.grievance_placeholder: Describe issues regarding seed quality, fertilizer stock, or subsidy delays...
officer.grievance_success: Your complaint has been logged. Case ID: #SA-2026-{id}. The officer will respond within 48 hours.

doctor.title: Doctor Agri Diagnostic Chat
doctor.description: Consult verified plant pathologists and agronomists with specialized knowledge in {crop} diseases.
doctor.chat_context: Starting chat with context: Cultivating {crop} in {district} soil.

ai.greeting: Vanakkam, {name}! I am AgriSmart AI. I see you are cultivating {crop} in {district}. How can I assist you with your crops today?
ai.reply_weather: AgriSmart AI: Current weather in {district} is favorable for {crop}. {weatherAdvice}
ai.reply_price: AgriSmart AI: {crop} prices in {district} private mandis average ₹{price}/quintal today, which is ₹{diff} above the government MSP of ₹{msp}.
ai.reply_pest: AgriSmart AI: To prevent common pests in {crop}, {pestAdvice}
ai.reply_schemes: AgriSmart AI: In {district}, you qualify for the High-Yield Seeds Subsidy. Apply at the Agri Extension Center with your Land Patta.
ai.reply_storage: AgriSmart AI: Keep {crop} in well-ventilated storage. Ideal humidity is {humidity}% and temp is {temp}°C. Nearest storage is {dist}km away.
ai.reply_expert: AgriSmart AI: I can bridge you to the Agri Officer for {district}. Click the 'District Agri Officer' card in your dashboard to call them directly.
